paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a change of 2.02% from the prior close and -36.32% over a window of 20 sessions. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

Recent filings include an 8-K form on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form on July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson.
